hero.title: Let's Build Something Extraordinary
hero.description: Tell us about your project and we'll get back to you within 2 hours.

quickCall.title: Prefer a quick call?
quickCall.description: Book a 15-minute discovery call and we will tell you exactly how we can help.

sidebar.responseTime: We respond within 2 hours during business hours (Mon-Fri, 9AM-6PM EST).

afterSubmit.question: What happens after I submit?
afterSubmit.answer: You'll hear from us within 2 hours during business hours. We'll review your submission and schedule a discovery call to understand your project in depth.

cost.question: How much does it cost?
cost.answer: Projects start at $5K. We'll provide a detailed proposal after understanding your specific needs, timeline, and goals.

smallBusiness.question: Do you work with small businesses?
smallBusiness.answer: Absolutely. From solopreneurs to enterprises — we scale our approach to match your stage and ambition.

step1.title: What do you need?
step1.description: Select the service that best matches your project.

step2.title: Tell us about your business
step2.description: This helps us tailor our approach to your specific situation.

step3.title: Project details
step3.description: Help us understand the scope and timeline.
step3.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell us about your project, goals, and any specific requirements...

step4.title: How can we reach you?
step4.description: We will get back to you within 2 hours.

form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

success.title: Thank You!
success.message: We have received your submission and will get back to you within 2 hours during business hours.
